user.title: Add Tuya Device
user.description: Enter basic device info and choose how you want to set up the device. Smart Life login is the easiest — Conti stores your credentials once and auto-discovers devices from your account.

data_description.host: Local IP address of the device on your home network. Leave blank in Smart Life / cloud-assisted mode — Conti will try to detect it automatically.
data_description.onboarding_mode: Smart Life: log in once, devices auto-discovered. IR Device: add a Tuya IR hub and store its command library locally. Cloud-assisted (legacy): enter project credentials per session. Manual: enter credentials yourself (advanced).

oauth_login.title: Login with Smart Life
oauth_login.description:
Enter your User Code and select your data centre region. On the next screen you will scan a QR code with the Smart Life / Tuya Smart app to authorise Conti.

Your User Code is shown on the Tuya IoT Platform under **Cloud → Link Tuya App Account → Add App Account** (also called “App Account UID” in some regions).

data_description.user_code: Account identifier from the Tuya IoT Platform (Cloud → Link Tuya App Account → Add App Account).
data_description.tuya_region: Select the Tuya data centre closest to your region.

oauth_qr_scan.title: Scan QR Code with Smart Life App
oauth_qr_scan.description:
Open the **Smart Life** app on your phone, tap the **scan icon** (top-right of the Profile tab), and scan the QR code shown below.

After scanning and tapping **Confirm** in the app, click **Submit**.

oauth_pick_device.title: Select Device
oauth_pick_device.description: Choose a device from your Smart Life account to add. Conti will auto-fill credentials and attempt local control.

ir_select_device.title: Select IR Device
ir_select_device.description: Choose an IR hub from your Smart Life account. If your IR hub is missing from the list, enter its Tuya Device ID manually.

cloud_credentials.title: Tuya Cloud — Sign In
cloud_credentials.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform API credentials. Conti will connect to your account, fetch your linked devices, and let you select the one to set up - no manual Device ID or Local Key required.

Credentials are used only during setup for normal local devices. For low-power sleepy sensors that require cloud runtime polling, credentials are stored for that device.

manual_credentials.title: Manual Device Credentials
manual_credentials.description: Enter the Device ID and Local Key for your device. Both values can be found in the Tuya IoT Platform under your device details.

data_description.device_id: Unique device identifier from Tuya IoT Platform.
data_description.local_key: 16-character encryption key from Tuya IoT Platform.

cloud_pick_device.title: Select Cloud Device
cloud_pick_device.description: Multiple cloud devices are available. Choose the correct device to auto-fill Device ID and Local Key.

confirm_host.title: Enter Device IP Address

data_description.host: Local IP address of the device on your home network (e.g. 192.168.1.100).

detect.title: Detection Results

data.use_cloud_assist: Use Tuya Cloud to improve mapping (optional)

cloud_assist.title: Tuya Cloud Assist (Optional)
cloud_assist.description:
Provide your Tuya IoT Platform API credentials to fetch the device schema.  This improves DP mapping accuracy.  Leave blank to skip.

Credentials are used only during setup for normal local devices. For low-power sleepy sensors that require cloud runtime polling, credentials are stored for that device.

review.title: Review DP Mapping
review.description:
Profile: {profile_name} ({confidence} confidence, source: {mapping_source})

{confidence_warning}

DP Mapping:
```
{dp_summary}
```

Choose an action below.

data.dp_map: DP Mapping (JSON) — only used if you choose Manual Edit

pre_learn.title: Guided Learn — Device Classification

data.gang_count: Number of switches / outlets (adjust if incorrect)

ir_category.title: IR Setup — Select Category
ir_category.description: Choose the appliance category for this IR remote.

ir_fetch.title: IR Setup — Fetch Library
ir_fetch.description: Conti is fetching and storing the IR command library.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device over local TCP. Check host/IP, port, and routing/firewall rules between Home Assistant and the device.
error.device_not_responding: Device not responding (offline or wrong IP).
error.port_blocked_local_unsupported: Port blocked or device does not support local control.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid local key or device not compatible.
error.wrong_protocol: Protocol mismatch. The device rejected all attempted protocol versions (3.3, 3.4, 3.5, 3.1). Check the device firmware version.
error.invalid_dp_map: The DP mapping JSON is not valid. Please check the format.
error.cloud_fetch_failed: Could not fetch device schema from Tuya Cloud. Check your credentials and try again, or skip cloud assist.
error.cloud_auth_failed: Tuya cloud authentication failed. Check Access ID, Access Secret, and selected region.
error.cloud_permission_expired: Tuya cloud development plan permission has expired for this project (code 28841002). Renew the plan/subscription in Tuya IoT Cloud and retry.
error.cloud_region_mismatch: Tuya cloud region mismatch. The selected data centre does not match your linked project/account region.
error.cloud_api_path_failed: Tuya cloud API path is not available for this project/region. Check project type and selected region.
error.cloud_parse_failed: Received an unexpected response from Tuya cloud. Please try again; if it persists, check integration logs.
error.cloud_pagination_failed: Cloud device list pagination did not complete safely. Please try again; if it persists, check integration logs.
error.cloud_api_failed: Tuya cloud API request failed due to a network/API error. Please try again.
error.cloud_credentials_required: Tuya cloud credentials are required when cloud auto-fill is enabled.
error.cloud_no_device_match: No linked cloud devices were returned for this Tuya project/region. Check credentials, region, and project linkage.
error.cloud_device_missing_local_key: The selected cloud device was found, but Tuya did not return a local key. This can happen with some account/project configurations. Use Manual onboarding as fallback.
error.oauth_token_expired: Smart Life session has expired. Please re-authenticate by removing and re-adding the integration.
error.oauth_setup_failed: Could not connect to your Smart Life account. Check your credentials and try again.
error.smart_life_login_failed: Smart Life QR code authorization failed. Please try again.
error.qr_generation_failed: Failed to generate QR code. Check your User Code and region, then try again. See integration logs for details.
error.qr_not_scanned: QR code has not been scanned yet. Open the Smart Life app, scan the QR code, then click Submit.
error.user_code_required: User Code is required for Smart Life QR login. Find it in the Tuya IoT Platform under Cloud → Link Tuya App Account.
error.app_credentials_missing: Smart Life login is unavailable. The Home Assistant administrator must set TUYA_APP_ACCESS_ID and TUYA_APP_ACCESS_SECRET environment variables. See integration documentation.
error.manual_credentials_required: Enter both Device ID and Local Key, or enable cloud auto-fill.
error.host_required_manual: Device IP address is required for manual onboarding. Enter the local IP of the device.
error.empty_dp_map: No data points are mapped. The device would create no entities. Use Guided Learn or Manual Edit to add mappings.
error.incomplete_cct_map: This light looks like a warm/cool (CCT) device, but the mapping is missing brightness and/or colour temperature. Use Guided Learn or Manual Edit before finishing.
error.ir_library_fetch_failed: Unable to fetch IR library. Device may be offline, unsupported, or not linked to this Smart Life account.
error.ir_no_device_found:
No IR devices found.

Make sure:
- The device is added in Smart Life
- The device category is IR remote
- You are using the same Smart Life account
error.ir_command_not_found: The selected IR command, category, brand, or model was not found.
error.ir_command_exists: That IR command already exists. Enable overwrite to replace it.
error.ir_learning_failed: IR learning failed. Make sure the remote was captured and try again.
error.ir_send_failed: IR command sending failed on all available paths.

init.title: Conti Device Options
init.description: Edit the DP mapping, toggle debug logging, re-discover DPs, or open external-ON profile settings.

external_on.title: External-ON Correction Profile
external_on.description: Configure time-based brightness and warmth correction applied when the light is turned on externally (RF remote / wall switch). Set a slot’s brightness to 0 to disable that slot.

ir_options.title: IR Device Options
ir_options.description: Manage learned commands for this IR device.

ir_learn.title: Add Missing IR Command
ir_learn.description:
Enter the action name, then press Submit to start IR learning mode.

{ac_warning}

ir_learn_capture.title: Capture IR Command
ir_learn_capture.description: Point the original remote at the IR hub and press the button for **{action}**, then click Submit.

error.invalid_dp_map: The DP mapping JSON is not valid.
error.ir_learning_failed: IR learning failed. Make sure the captured payload is not empty or too short.
error.ir_command_exists: That IR command already exists. Enable overwrite to replace it.
